title: General Aptitude - Quantitative Aptitude - Digital Image Processing

questions.question:
​​​​A \( 4 \times 4 \) digital image has pixel intensities \( (U) \) as shown in the figure. The number of pixels with \( U \leq 4 \) is:
 

\begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|}
\hline 0 & 1 & 0 & 2 \\
\hline 4 & 7 & 3 & 3 \\
\hline 5 & 5 & 4 & 4 \\
\hline 6 & 7 & 3 & 2 \\
\hline
\end{array}



GATE DA 2025 | GA Question: 3
